case_title: SHOREVIEW APARTMENTS vs. MATHEWS, IRENE et al

docket_entries.description: LAW AND MOTION, DEPT 01, MOTION HEARING ON ENTRY OF JUDGMENT, CALENDAR OF SEP-08-1997, GRANTED PURSUANT TO WRITTEN ORDER NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT AT CALLING OF THE CASE. JUDGMENT IS ENTERED FOR THE PLAINTIFF.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MATHEWS, IRENE THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 40 BEATRICE LANE #4, S.F. $1,243.65 RENT, $350.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $118.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,711.65, LEASE FORFEITED, DEFT WAS TO PAY $1,361.65 TO MANAGEMENT'S OFFICE ON OR BEFORE 8/11/97 5PM & $50- PER MONTH FOR 7 MONTHS FOR ATTY FEES BY THE 5TH BUSINESS DAY IN ADDTION TO MONTHLY RENT SET BY HUD. SECURITY DEPOSIT OF $251- TO BE USED AGAINST DEBT OWED IF JUDGMENT ENTERED.
